title: Minecraft But Hotbar Only
description: Minecraft But Hotbar Only limits your inventory to just the 9 slots in your hotbar. Every other inventory slot is disabled, forcing you to survive Minecraft with minimal storage and smarter item management.
body:
## Minecraft, But Hotbar Only...
Minecraft But Hotbar Only completely removes access to your main inventory and leaves you with only the 9 slots in your hotbar. That means no extra storage, no backup tools, and no carrying stacks of resources. Every item you bring matters.

![Hotbar Only](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d8aaf9401f6076d084e6b0325592255c36bd55c2.png)

This simple change creates a surprisingly challenging and strategic survival experience:

🧠 Carefully choose which tools, blocks, and food to carry 
⛏️ Manage resources efficiently with extremely limited inventory space 
🎒 Use chests, shulker boxes, and ender chests more creatively 
⚔️ Prepare smarter for mining, exploring, and boss fights 
🔥 Experience Minecraft in a whole new way

Whether you're a veteran player looking for a fresh challenge or a content creator searching for a unique "Minecraft But..." concept, this mod delivers a fun and intense twist on vanilla survival.

Features
- Only the hotbar's 9 slots are usable
- All other player inventory slots are disabled, even the offhand slot
- Works in both single-player and multiplayer
- Lightweight and compatible with most setups
